Meet Gethro — your memoir companion. He remembers everything you tell him.
Your personal memoir

The stories
only you
can tell.

Speak or type a memory. Gethro asks the questions that bring it to life — then weaves everything into a beautifully written story, ready to print or share.

🎙️Say it out loud — Gethro listens, asks follow-ups, and turns rough words into beautiful prose
📖End up with a real printed book your grandchildren can hold in fifty years
🔒Your memories are private by default — share only what you choose, with who you choose

Tell me about the house you grew up in. What did it smell like when you walked through the front door?

What’s a memory from childhood that still makes you smile every time it comes back to you?

When did you first fall in love — and what was it about that person that caught you off guard?

What’s the hardest thing you’ve ever had to do, and what did it teach you about yourself?

If your grandchildren could read one thing about the life you’ve lived, what would you most want them to know?

Your Book

Cover Style

⚠️ Your story needs at least 20 pages to order as a printed book. Add more memories to grow your story — the more you add, the richer your book!
Before we send to print To print your book, your story will be securely uploaded to Peecho (Netherlands) for fulfilment. Peecho receives only your formatted story text — no account details.

Help & About

Questions? I'm here. Ask me anything about LifeTold.

✨

New here? Take the tour.

A quick 5-step walkthrough of everything LifeTold can do — takes about a minute.

📖 How it works

Let’s Talk — Start a voice conversation. The AI asks you questions about your life and listens to your answers.

Typed Entry — Prefer to type? Write any memory or reflection here.

Voice Memo — Record a longer spoken memory in one go.

Photos — Upload a photo and tell the story behind it.

My Story — Generate a beautifully written memoir in any style — or turn it into a comedy roast. Export to PDF.

Dashboard — See how your story is shaping up — coverage, health checks, and what to write next.

🖨️ Printing your story

Go to My Story, generate your story, then click 🖨️ Print as Book to order a real printed copy via Peecho — choose your format, enter your address and pay on their site.

🎙️

Ask Gethro

Gethro can answer any question about the app, your entries, or your story — from any screen. Just tap the button below.

ℹ️ About

LifeTold is a personal memoir companion that helps you record, organise and preserve your life story for the people who matter most.

lifetold.app

Made by Gethro Labs Pty Ltd  ·  ABN 79 698 041 575

Powered by Groq AI, Supabase, and Peecho.

📬 Get in touch

Privacy questions, bugs, feature ideas, or anything else — Gethro will pass it on.

🔒 Privacy & Terms

Who sees my words? When Gethro writes your story, your entries are sent to an AI service for that moment only — neither Groq (free) nor Anthropic (Premium) store your content after processing, and neither trains their models on LifeTold data. Anthropic only ever sees LifeTold's API key — your name, email, and identity never leave LifeTold's systems. You can see full details in Settings → Your Privacy.

AI Processing & Overseas Transfer. Story generation, duplicate detection and writing assistance sends your memoir content to Groq, Inc. (United States) on the free plan, or to Anthropic, Inc. (United States) on Premium. Voice questions use OpenAI, Inc. (United States) for text-to-speech. None of these providers retain your content after processing or use it for model training. Australian Privacy Law may not apply once your data is disclosed to these overseas recipients — see the Terms you agreed to at sign-up.

Print Services. If you order a printed book, your story is sent to Peecho B.V. (Netherlands) for fulfilment.

Data Storage. Your entries, photos and account data are stored securely in Australia via Supabase (Sydney region, ap-southeast-2) 🇦🇺. No data is sold or shared beyond the above.

Fonts. App fonts (Playfair Display, Lato, Cormorant Garamond) are self-hosted. Google Fonts is not used and does not receive your IP address.

Data Care. We take reasonable care to protect your data but recommend exporting your entries periodically as a backup.

Liability. The developer shall not be liable for any loss or harm arising from your use of this application.

Privacy Policy. A full Privacy Policy covering your rights, data retention, and how to make a complaint is available at lifetold.app/privacy.

Looking for email preferences, password, or account settings?

📶 You’re offline — changes won’t save until reconnected

⚠️ Delete My Data

This will permanently delete all your life story entries. This cannot be undone. Your account will remain active.

Privacy & Terms

Privacy & Terms — v1.4

LifeTold is a personal memoir companion that helps you record, organise and preserve your life story. By continuing you agree to the following:

1. Third-Party AI Processing & Overseas Data Transfer. To generate stories, check for duplicate entries, and assist with writing, your memoir content is sent overseas for AI processing. On the free plan, content is sent to Groq, Inc. (United States). On the Premium plan, content is sent to Anthropic, Inc. (United States) via their API. For voice questions and audio features, text is sent to OpenAI, Inc. (United States) for text-to-speech. Groq, Anthropic, and OpenAI are based in the United States. Australian Privacy Law (including the Australian Privacy Act 1988) may not apply to your information once it is disclosed to these overseas recipients. Groq and Anthropic do not retain prompts or responses after processing and do not use them for model training. See Groq’s Privacy Policy, Anthropic’s Privacy Policy, and OpenAI’s Privacy Policy. By continuing, you expressly consent to this cross-border disclosure under APP 8.2(a) of the Australian Privacy Act 1988.

2. Print Services. If you order a printed book, your story is sent to Peecho B.V. (Netherlands) for print-on-demand fulfilment. See Peecho’s Privacy Policy.

3. Data Storage. Your entries, photos and account data are stored securely in Australia via Supabase (Sydney region, ap-southeast-2) 🇦🇺. See Supabase’s Privacy Policy.

4. Data Care. We take reasonable care to protect your data but cannot guarantee against loss in the event of a technical failure. We recommend exporting your entries periodically.

5. Limitation of Liability. The developer shall not be liable for any loss or harm arising from your use of this application.

6. Changes to Terms. We may update these terms from time to time. You will be asked to re-accept any material changes before continuing.

7. Privacy Policy. A full Privacy Policy covering your rights under the Australian Privacy Act 1988, data retention periods, and how to make a complaint is available at lifetold.app/privacy.

Your acceptance is recorded with a timestamp for compliance purposes.

Set a new password

Choose a new password for your account. At least 12 characters keeps your memories safe.

Your story companion

Hello, I'm Gethro.

I'm here to help you capture the moments that made you who you are. I'll ask a few quick questions to get started — feel free to skip any you'd rather not answer.

First things first

What should I call you?

Just your first name is enough to get started.

Where your story begins

When were you born?

This helps me give your story a sense of time and place.

A little about you

What brings you here?

I can help with a few memories or your whole life story — what feels right?

Here's how it works

Simple as talking.

  • 🎙️ Speak or type any memory — big or small
  • 🤔 I'll ask follow-ups to bring the story to life
  • 📚 Print a book from your story, any time

This is what you're building

Your story, kept forever.

  • 📖 A book for the coffee table — hold your whole life in your hands
  • 🎧 An audiobook for the grandkids — Gethro reads it aloud
  • 💌 Share with family — a private link they can read anywhere

It all starts with your first memory.

Your first memory

Let's start here.

What's one of your earliest memories?

Speak your answer or type it — whatever feels natural.

1 of 6

Hi — I’m Gethro

I’m your memoir companion. That little button floating on every screen — that’s me. Tap me any time you want help, a question, or just someone to talk to.

Let me show you around in about a minute.

2 of 6

You move between sections using the tabs.

On a phone they’re at the bottom of the screen. On a computer they’re at the top. Four tabs: Dashboard, Add Memory, My Memories, and My Story.

I’ll show you what each one does in the next few slides.

3 of 6
✨ Add Memory

This is where we start.

Speak it, type it, record it — any memory, any size. Even one sentence is enough to begin. I’ll ask follow-up questions to bring it to life.

4 of 6
📖 My Story

Where your memories become something lasting.

I’ll weave them into prose, poetry, a letter, a song — you choose. Then print it as a book, download an audiobook, or share with family.

5 of 6
🏠 Dashboard

Watch your life story take shape.

The dashboard shows how much of your life you’ve covered and which chapters still need telling. It gets richer the more you write.

6 of 6

Ready? Let’s write your first memory together.

Tap below and I’ll take you straight to Add Memory. Start with anything  — a moment, a place, a person you remember.

Gethro
Your memory companion
Entry deleted
📱
Add to your Home Screen
Tap Share ⬆ then Add to Home Screen to use LifeTold like a native app.
🎙
Voice recording needs Safari
Apple does not allow voice recording in home screen apps. Tap below to open in Safari — everything else stays the same.
Open in Safari
💡 Tip: make a home screen icon that opens in Safari
1. Open the Shortcuts app on your iPad
2. Tap + then Add Action
3. Search for Open URL and tap it
4. Paste: https://lifetold.app
5. Tap the shortcut name, choose an icon, tap Add to Home Screen
📱
Install LifeTold
Add to your home screen for quick access
